top_candidates.reasoning: The symmetric-paired structure ('whatever ships has a deprecation ahead of it; whatever gets deprecated has a replacement ahead of that') is the precise rhetorical shape of jātasya... dhruvo mṛtyuḥ / dhruvaṁ janma mṛtasya ca.
Concessive theme appears (the verse follows the materialist branch begun in 2.26) but 2.26 contributes the conditional and 2.27 contributes the closing.
Lifecycle-structure theme present, but 2.28's argument is the three-phase shape (unmanifest → manifest → unmanifest), not the paired birth-death cycle.
